## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release / tooling

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test -- --ci`
- [ ] `npm run --prefix frontend test -- --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or README examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, tokens, or private repo data are committed.
- [ ] I reviewed the published package surface if this changes distribution files.

## Screenshots / recordings

If this changes the UI, add screenshots or a short recording.
